# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# The generic alloys_expenditure_megastructures object deliberately remains
# upstream/parent-owned. Director route weights may rank legal projects, but a
# global reserve must not crowd out outposts, ships, or other alloy lanes.

# Pegasus 4.4.4 full-object overrides for alloy-funded ship construction and upgrades.
# The vanilla weights and war/crisis multipliers remain. At 80% used naval
# capacity, peacetime construction receives a bounded share reduction instead
# of becoming ineligible. This retains a cautious 4.4.4 workaround while weak
# absolute fleets and civilian science-ship demand can still recover.
# Threat response and identity tie-breakers apply only during ordinary
# peacetime underfill and never during war, recent-loss, crisis, collapse, or
# short-runway states.

alloys_expenditure_ships = {
	resource = alloys
	type = expenditure
	category = ships


	weight = {
		weight = 0.6

		# spend more alloys building ships while at war
		modifier = {
			factor = 3
			OR = {
				recently_lost_war = yes
				is_at_war = yes
			}
		}

		# spend less alloys on ships if over capacity
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.75
			used_naval_capacity_percent >= 1.0
		}

		# Biological Ships use less alloys
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.33
			country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = 5
			used_naval_capacity_percent < 1.5
			OR = {
				any_neighbor_country = {
					has_ascension_perk = ap_become_the_crisis
				}
				any_country = {
					is_crisis_faction = yes
				}
			}
		}
		# Pegasus 4.4.4 high-capacity declaration workaround. Reduce, but do
		# not eliminate, the ship lane so weak absolute fleets can still recover.
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.25
			staid_peacetime_high_naval_capacity_guard = yes
		}
		# Bounded H09b arms-race nudge for threatened peacetime underfill.
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.10
			highest_threat > 50
			used_naval_capacity_percent < 0.80
			is_at_war = no
			NOT = { recently_lost_war = yes }
			staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no
			staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no
			NOR = {
				any_neighbor_country = {
					has_ascension_perk = ap_become_the_crisis
				}
				any_country = {
					is_crisis_faction = yes
				}
			}
		}
		# Bounded H08c identity bias for ordinary peacetime underfill only.
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.12
			staid_archetype_hard_extermination = yes
			staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
			staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
			used_naval_capacity_percent < 0.80
			is_at_war = no
			NOT = { recently_lost_war = yes }
			staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no
			staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no
			NOR = {
				any_neighbor_country = {
					has_ascension_perk = ap_become_the_crisis
				}
				any_country = {
					is_crisis_faction = yes
				}
			}
		}
		# Bounded H08c identity bias for ordinary peacetime underfill only.
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.08
			staid_archetype_hard_conquest = yes
			staid_archetype_identity_conflict = no
			staid_archetype_eligible_country = yes
			used_naval_capacity_percent < 0.80
			is_at_war = no
			NOT = { recently_lost_war = yes }
			staid_catastrophic_collapse_mode = no
			staid_core_deficit_short_runway = no
			NOR = {
				any_neighbor_country = {
					has_ascension_perk = ap_become_the_crisis
				}
				any_country = {
					is_crisis_faction = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}

	desired_min = {
		base = 0

		modifier = {
			add = @ai_ship_budget_desired_min_per_year
			country_uses_bio_ships = no
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = trigger:years_passed
		}
	}

	potential = {
		# This category also funds civilian science ships. Keep the native lane
		# available; affordability and competing budget shares govern execution.
		always = yes
	}
}

alloys_expenditure_ship_upgrades = {
	resource = alloys
	type = expenditure
	category = ship_upgrades


	weight = {
		weight = 0.2

		# spend more on ship upgrades if at capacity
		modifier = {
			factor = 2.5
			used_naval_capacity_percent >= 1.0
		}

		# Biological Ships use less alloys
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.33
			country_uses_bio_ships = yes
		}
	}

	potential = {
		is_at_war = no
		any_owned_fleet = {
			controller = { is_same_value = root }
			can_be_upgraded = yes
		}
	}
}
